title: 🚨 NWS Severe: High Wind Warning
summary:
* WHAT...Southwest winds 45 to 60 mph with gusts up to 80 mph
expected.

* WHERE...Atka and Adak.

* WHEN...From 7 PM Saturday to 4 PM AKDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...High winds may move loose debris, damage property, and
cause power outages. Travel will be difficult.

* ADDITIONAL DETAILS...Strong easterly winds move in Saturday
morning, but the highest winds and worst conditions will begin

title: 🚨 NWS Severe: High Wind Watch
summary:

title: 🚨 NWS Unknown: Avalanche Warning
summary:
SABAFC

The following message is transmitted at the request of the
Valdez Avalanche Center.

...THE VALDEZ AVALANCHE CENTER HAS ISSUED AN AVALANCHE WARNING...

* WHAT... Wet heavy snow and strong southeasterly winds are
overloading a weak snowpack. Very dangerous avalanche conditions
exist.

* WHERE...For the mountains surrounding the Valdez and Thompson
Pass area, including Ernestine.
